project.name: Real Estate Landing Page
project.description: A dedicated web page designed to attract and capture leads for real estate purposes, acting as a focused entry point for marketing campaigns.
objectives: Generate high-quality leads (e.g., potential buyers, sellers, renters)
Provide information related to real estate services or properties
Convert visitors into actionable leads through a clear Call to Action

userRoles.name: Website Visitor/Potential Lead
userRoles.description: An individual who lands on the page, seeking real estate information or services.
goals: Find relevant real estate information (properties, services, market data)
Easily contact a real estate professional
Submit their information in exchange for value (e.g., property details, valuation)

metadata.rationale: Directly implied by the purpose of a lead generation landing page in the real estate domain.

userRoles.name: Agent/Administrator
userRoles.description: A real estate agent or administrative staff responsible for managing and following up on leads generated by the landing page.
goals: Access tools or systems to manage leads efficiently

metadata.rationale: The core purpose of the landing page is lead generation, implying an entity to receive and process these leads.

functionalRequirements.title: Display Compelling Headline
functionalRequirements.description: The landing page shall display a clear, concise, and compelling headline that captures attention and states the main benefit or offer.

metadata.rationale: A common feature and best practice for effective landing pages, explicitly mentioned in research.

functionalRequirements.title: Display High-Quality Visuals
functionalRequirements.description: The landing page shall feature high-quality photography or video showcasing properties, agents, or the target area to engage visitors.

metadata.rationale: Crucial for real estate marketing to visually attract and inform potential clients, listed as a common feature.

functionalRequirements.title: Display Value Proposition/Benefit Statement
functionalRequirements.description: The landing page shall clearly explain what the user will gain by engaging with the page (e.g., 'Find Your Dream Home', 'Sell Your Home Fast').

metadata.rationale: Essential for convincing visitors to convert, listed as a common feature.

functionalRequirements.title: Lead Capture Form Submission
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall provide a form for users to submit their information (name, email, phone number) to generate a lead.

metadata.rationale: Primary mechanism for achieving the project's lead generation objective, listed as a common feature.

functionalRequirements.title: Display Clear Call to Action (CTA)
functionalRequirements.description: The landing page shall feature a prominent button or link that directs the user to take the desired action (e.g., 'Learn More', 'Schedule a Showing').

metadata.rationale: Directly supports the lead generation goal and is a common feature of landing pages.

functionalRequirements.title: Display Agent/Company Information
functionalRequirements.description: The landing page shall display contact details, branding, and a brief introduction to the associated real estate agent or agency.

metadata.rationale: Builds trust and provides necessary contact points for potential leads, listed as a common feature.

functionalRequirements.title: Display Submission Confirmation
functionalRequirements.description: Upon successful submission of the lead capture form, the system shall display a confirmation message to the user.

metadata.rationale: Standard user experience for form submissions, ensuring the user knows their action was successful, part of common workflows.

functionalRequirements.title: Forward Lead Information
functionalRequirements.description: Upon successful submission of the lead capture form, the system shall forward the collected lead information to a designated recipient or system (e.g., CRM, email).

metadata.rationale: Essential for the lead generation objective; the leads must be actionable by an agent/administrator, part of common workflows.

candidateFunctionalRequirements.title: Dynamic Content Display
candidateFunctionalRequirements.description: The system could dynamically adjust content based on user behavior, location, or referral source.

metadata.rationale: Identified as an advanced feature in research, but not explicitly requested by the user. Requires clarification.

candidateFunctionalRequirements.title: Virtual Tour/3D Walkthrough Display
candidateFunctionalRequirements.description: The system could display virtual tours or 3D walkthroughs for properties, allowing interactive exploration.

metadata.rationale: Identified as an advanced feature and market trend. Depends on whether specific properties are featured and if virtual tours are available.

candidateFunctionalRequirements.title: Chatbot Integration
candidateFunctionalRequirements.description: The system could integrate a chatbot to provide instant answers to common questions and assist with lead qualification.

metadata.rationale: Identified as an advanced feature and market trend. Requires user confirmation.

candidateFunctionalRequirements.title: Social Proof Display (Testimonials/Reviews)
candidateFunctionalRequirements.description: The landing page could display testimonials or reviews from satisfied clients to build trust and credibility.

metadata.rationale: Identified as an advanced feature and common trust-building element. Not explicitly requested.

candidateFunctionalRequirements.title: Interactive Map Integration
candidateFunctionalRequirements.description: The system could integrate an interactive map to show property locations and nearby amenities.

metadata.rationale: Identified as an advanced feature and useful for property context. Depends on whether specific properties are featured.

candidateFunctionalRequirements.title: Mortgage Calculator
candidateFunctionalRequirements.description: The system could include an interactive mortgage calculator for users to estimate potential payments.

metadata.rationale: Identified as an advanced feature. Not explicitly requested.

candidateFunctionalRequirements.title: Property Search Functionality
candidateFunctionalRequirements.description: If specific property listings are featured, the system could provide search functionality (e.g., by location, price, property type).

metadata.rationale: Implied if the landing page is to feature multiple properties, but depends on clarification of 'Property Information Source'.

candidateFunctionalRequirements.title: MLS/IDX Integration
candidateFunctionalRequirements.description: If property listings are dynamically updated, the system could integrate with an MLS/IDX feed to display real-time property data.

metadata.rationale: A standard for displaying current property listings. Depends on clarification of 'Property Information Source'.

candidate: The landing page shall be fully responsive and optimized for display across various devices (desktop, tablet, mobile).
The landing page shall have fast loading times (e.g., under 3 seconds) to minimize bounce rates and improve user experience.
The landing page shall employ SSL/HTTPS to ensure secure communication and protect user data during submission.
The landing page content and functionality shall comply with relevant accessibility guidelines (e.g., WCAG) to ensure usability for individuals with disabilities.
The landing page content and marketing claims shall comply with the Fair Housing Act and Truth in Advertising regulations.
The system shall ensure secure handling of Personally Identifiable Information (PII) collected via lead forms, adhering to privacy regulations (e.g., GDPR, CCPA if applicable).

businessRules.title: Lead Form Data Validation
businessRules.description: The lead capture form shall validate all required fields (e.g., name, email, phone) before submission to ensure complete data capture.

metadata.rationale: Essential for collecting usable leads; standard practice for web forms.

businessRules.title: Fair Housing Act Compliance
businessRules.description: All content displayed on the landing page (text, images, targeting) must comply with the Fair Housing Act to prohibit discrimination.

metadata.rationale: Explicitly stated as a legal regulation in the real estate domain.

businessRules.title: Truth in Advertising Compliance
businessRules.description: All claims about properties, services, and offers presented on the landing page must be accurate and not misleading.

metadata.rationale: Explicitly stated as a legal regulation.

entities.name: Lead
entities.description: Information captured from a potential client who interacted with the landing page.

attributes.name: Name
attributes.description: Full name of the potential lead.

attributes.name: Email
attributes.description: Email address of the potential lead.

attributes.name: Phone Number
attributes.description: Contact phone number of the potential lead.

attributes.name: Inquiry Type
attributes.description: The specific nature of the lead's inquiry (e.g., 'Property Inquiry', 'Home Valuation Request', 'General Contact').

attributes.name: Submission Timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the lead form was submitted.

metadata.rationale: Core entity for a lead generation landing page.

entities.name: Agent/Company Profile
entities.description: Information about the real estate professional or agency associated with the landing page.

attributes.name: Name
attributes.description: Name of the agent or company.

attributes.name: Contact Information
attributes.description: Primary contact details (e.g., phone, email, office address).

attributes.name: Branding Elements
attributes.description: Logo, brand colors, and other visual identity elements.

attributes.name: Introduction/Bio
attributes.description: Brief description or bio of the agent/company.

metadata.rationale: Essential for establishing credibility and providing contact points, as per common features.

entities.name: Property (Candidate)
entities.description: Details about a specific real estate property, if featured on the landing page.

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: Detailed text description of the property.

attributes.name: Features
attributes.description: Key features of the property (e.g., number of bedrooms, bathrooms, square footage).

metadata.rationale: This entity is conditional, depending on whether the landing page will feature specific property listings. Clarification is needed via 'Property Information Source' question.

workflows.name: Lead Capture for General Service Inquiry
workflows.description: Workflow for a user to submit their information to inquire about a general real estate service.

steps.action: Website Visitor arrives on the landing page (e.g., from an ad promoting 'sell your home fast').
Website Visitor reads the value proposition about general real estate services.
Website Visitor fills out the lead capture form (e.g., 'Get a Free Home Valuation' or 'Contact an Agent').
The system displays a confirmation message to the Website Visitor.
The system forwards lead information to the Agent/Administrator.

metadata.rationale: A common workflow for real estate landing pages, described in the research output.

workflows.name: Lead Capture for Property-Specific Inquiry (Candidate)
workflows.description: Workflow for a user to submit their information to inquire about a specific property.

steps.action: Website Visitor arrives on the landing page (e.g., from an ad for a specific property).
Website Visitor views property details and images.
Website Visitor fills out a 'Request Info' or 'Schedule Showing' form related to the property.
The system displays a confirmation message to the Website Visitor.
The system forwards lead information, including property interest, to the Agent/Administrator.

metadata.rationale: A common workflow described in the research output, but dependent on whether the landing page will feature specific property listings. Clarification is needed via 'Property Information Source' question.

candidate.name: CRM System / Email Marketing Service
candidate.purpose: To receive and manage lead information submitted through the landing page, enabling agents to follow up and nurture leads.

metadata.rationale: Essential for the lead generation workflow; explicitly mentioned in research as a common operational constraint and market trend.

candidate.name: MLS/IDX Feed (Candidate)
candidate.purpose: To automatically display property listings and keep them updated on the landing page.

metadata.rationale: A standard integration for displaying real estate listings, but dependent on whether the landing page will feature specific properties and how those properties will be sourced. Clarification is needed via 'Property Information Source' question.

assumptions.assumption: The landing page's primary goal is lead generation.
assumptions.reason: Landing pages are specifically designed for conversion, with lead capture being a predominant goal in real estate marketing, as stated by the Research Agent.

assumptions.assumption: The landing page is intended for a specific marketing campaign, rather than a general website homepage.
assumptions.reason: The term 'landing page' implies a focused, campaign-specific purpose with a singular Call to Action, as stated by the Research Agent.

outOfScope.description: Full multi-page real estate website with extensive navigation and multiple sections.
User accounts or authentication for potential leads or visitors.
Complex CRM functionalities beyond receiving lead data (e.g., lead scoring, advanced analytics within the landing page system).

unresolvedQuestions.question: Is this landing page primarily intended to attract potential buyers, sellers, renters, or a specific type of real estate investor? Please specify the primary target audience(s) and their main objective when visiting the page.
Will the landing page feature specific property listings? If so, will these listings be manually managed (entered one-by-one) or automatically integrated via an MLS/IDX feed or another data source?

What is the single most important call to action (CTA) for users on this landing page? (e.g., 'Request a Home Valuation', 'Browse Listings', 'Schedule a Showing', 'Contact an Agent', 'Get a Cash Offer')
What specific geographic region or areas will this real estate landing page target? (e.g., a specific city, state, or neighborhood)

missingCriticalInformation: Specific target audience for the landing page
Confirmation on whether properties will be displayed and their source
The exact primary Call to Action (CTA)
